codeReview.summary: The fix correctly hardens all bootstrap-sync stages that consumed mocked CCXT arrays. Each changed site now coerces non-array fulfilled results to an empty array, which preserves live-path behavior for real provider returns while preventing the module-test startup crashes described by the feature.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, and commit 36519fa. The implementation matches the intended behavior, closes the mocked undefined-payload crash across exchange/coin/chain/ticker sync stages, and I found no blocking or non-blocking code issues in scope.
